# ClawList.io
> The Skills Marketplace for AI Agents. Discover, share, and install skills for OpenClaw, Claude Code, and other AI agent frameworks.

## About
ClawList is a curated directory of skills (plugins) for OpenClaw and other AI agent frameworks. Browse 50+ ready-to-use skills with install commands, risk labels, and documentation.

## Sections
- Skills: https://clawlist.io/skills - Browse all available skills
- Guides: https://clawlist.io/guides - Step-by-step tutorials and walkthroughs
- Topics: https://clawlist.io/topics - Topic hubs connecting related skills and guides
- Blog: https://clawlist.io/blog - Latest articles and updates
- Apps: https://clawlist.io/apps - Standalone AI agent applications
- Security: https://clawlist.io/security - Security review information

## Contact
- Website: https://clawlist.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/Tony11081/clawlist-io
